summary: Completed testing of Flowtym PMS Supabase features. Backend PMS API tests passed (7/8). Frontend tests verified Flowboard KPIs, Housekeeping module with HousekeepingStats Chart.js component, and NotificationBell. Fixed a bug in QuickActionsWidget navigation. PMS Planning page redirects to flowboard when accessed directly (requires hotel context).

minor.issue: Returns 400 - guests table doesn't exist in Supabase schema (PGRST205 error)

integration_issues.issue: /pms and /pms/planning routes redirect to /flowboard after login - requires hotel context from HotelContext

passed_tests: TEST 1: Login Supabase (admin@flowtym.com / admin123) → Successful redirect to /flowboard
TEST 2: Flowboard KPIs display correctly - Occupation 27%, Arrivées 1, Départs 0, En séjour 4 clients, Chambres libres 8/11, Ménage fait 2/11
TEST 3: API Dashboard: GET /api/pms/dashboard/{hotel_id} returns to_percent=27, rooms_total=11, rooms_free=8, arrivals=1, departures=0, in_house=4, cleaning_done=2
TEST 4: API Rooms: GET /api/pms/rooms/{hotel_id} returns 11 rooms (101-304)
TEST 5: API Reservations: GET /api/pms/reservations/{hotel_id} returns 8 reservations
TEST 6: API Create Reservation: POST /api/pms/reservations with valid data → returns new reservation with status 'confirmee'
TEST 7: API Housekeeping: GET /api/pms/housekeeping/{hotel_id} returns 11 tasks for today
TEST 8: Housekeeping Réception: Stats KPIs correct (11 Chambres, 3 Départs, 8 Recouches, 1 En cours, 2 Terminées, 73% Propreté)
TEST 9: Housekeeping Satisfaction: HousekeepingStats component with Chart.js KPI cards (Total 22, En attente 16, En cours 2, Terminées 4, Taux 18%)
TEST 10: HousekeepingStats Charts: Taches terminées, Temps moyen par jour, Temps moyen par priorité (Doughnut), Récapitulatif
TEST 11: NotificationBell visible (data-testid='notification-bell') and panel opens on click
action_items: Consider adding guests table to Supabase schema if guest management is needed via PMS API
PMS Planning page navigation from direct URL needs hotel context - works when navigating via Operations menu
critical_code_review_comments: E-reputation scores remain MOCKED (hardcoded at 4.2/5) in Flowboard.jsx
HousekeepingStats shows 'Pas de données pour cette période' for bar/line charts because seeded tasks don't have completed_at timestamps - expected behavior
Some 401 errors in console when loading Satisfaction tab - likely related to satisfaction API endpoints
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/flowboard/Flowboard.jsx - Fixed QuickActionsWidget to use action.path || action.url
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing Supabase data (11 rooms, 8 reservations, 11 housekeeping tasks)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PMS Supabase API endpoints working correctly. HousekeepingStats component uses Chart.js with Supabase direct queries. The guests endpoint returns 400 because guests table doesn't exist in Supabase schema. PMS Planning page requires hotel context from HotelContext - works when navigating via Operations > Housekeeping menu. Fixed QuickActionsWidget bug where action.url was undefined (should use action.path).

mocked_apis.E-reputation: global_score hardcoded at 4.2/5 with platforms Google: 4.3, Booking: 4.1, TripAdvisor: 4.2

bug_fixed.issue: QuickActionsWidget onClick used action.url but actions were defined with action.path
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to action.path || action.url to support both
